Report generated 12-03-2026 12:21

TC [PAS-AUTO-MODERATE] - Validate Profile Auto-Moderation By Utilizing Thanos - Attractive & Generous

  5 To 10 Minutes (Duration)   Unique Browser   Not-Met-Criteria-Username-With-Valid-Selfie   Attractive-Member   Disable-Profile-Auto-Approve   PAS-Auto-Moderate   Enable-Profile-Auto-Approve

Validation Not Met - Username criteria for Profile Auto-Moderation - Attractive Member (Auto-Approved after First Name Approval)

Scenario Outline

Given API - Register user using profile id '<profile_id>'
And API - Mock moderation response using details as '{"username": "<invalid_first_name>"}' with decision 'moderate'
And API - Update Primary Location for profile id '<profile_id>' as 'Paris'
And API - Current user upload photo 'APPROVED_MALE' with qaRecommendation 'approve'
And API - Current user upload photo 'APPROVED_SELFIE' with qaRecommendation 'approve'
And QA API - Set 'Approve' Liveness Verification with Different Image 'B'
And API - Mock moderation response using details as '{"heading": "Hello there"}' with reason 'Asking/Offering Compensation' decision 'moderate'
And API - Mock moderation response using details as '{"about_me": "Hello, I am here to meet new people and build genuine connections over time."}' with reason 'Asking/Offering Compensation' decision 'moderate'
And API - Mock moderation response using details as '{"looking_for": "Looking to meet someone genuine and kind, and see where things can go."}' with reason 'Asking/Offering Compensation' decision 'moderate'
And API - Set IPCF Completion With API
When Admin user logs into the application
And PAS Moderator navigates to New Profile Moderation Queue
Then PAS Moderator should see new user record in Moderation Queue
And PAS Moderator clicks on 'End Work' Button in Moderation Queue
When PAS Moderator navigates to Admin
And Admin user searches with a new user profile id '<profile_id>'
And Admin user navigates to 'Dragyn' tab
Then Admin user should see 'Dragyn recommendation' for 'upload_photo_public' in 'Dragyn History' table
And Admin user should see 'Dragyn recommendation' for 'update_profile_looking_for' in 'Dragyn History' table
And Admin user should see 'Dragyn recommendation' for 'update_profile_about_me' in 'Dragyn History' table
And Admin user should see 'Dragyn recommendation' for 'update_profile_heading' in 'Dragyn History' table
And Admin user should see 'Dragyn recommendation' for 'update_profile_username' in 'Dragyn History' table
When Admin user navigates to 'Profile' tab
Then Admin verify 'Profile Approved' status as 'No'
And Admin should see 'Selfie Verified' badge on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin should see Pending Profile Updates for 'Heading' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin should see Pending Profile Updates for 'About Me' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin should see Pending Profile Updates for 'Looking For' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin user should see 'Public Photos' as 'Pending' or 'Approved' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin user should see 'Dragyn Recommendation' for the 'Heading' profile update as 'MODERATE' or 'DENY' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin user should see 'Dragyn Recommendation' for the 'About Me' profile update as 'MODERATE' or 'DENY' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin user should see 'Dragyn Recommendation' for the 'Looking For' profile update as 'MODERATE' or 'DENY' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin user should see 'Dragyn Recommendation' for the 'First Name' profile update as 'MODERATE' or 'DENY' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin user should see 'Dragyn Reason' for profile update 'Looking For' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin user should see 'Dragyn Reason' for profile update 'First Name' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin clicks on 'Approve' button for 'First Name' on 'Admin Profile' page
And User wait for '1' minute to timeout
When Admin user navigates to 'Thanos' tab
Then Admin user should NOT see fraud signal as 'Fraud Detection' for 'onboarding' in 'Thanos History' table
And Admin user should NOT see recommendation for 'onboarding' and 'Fraud Detection' in 'Thanos History' table
And Admin user should NOT see recommendation score for 'onboarding' and 'Fraud Detection' in 'Thanos History' table
When Admin user navigates to 'Profile' tab
Then Admin should see Pending Profile Updates for 'Heading' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin should see Pending Profile Updates for 'About Me' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin should see Pending Profile Updates for 'Looking For' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin user should see 'Public Photos' as 'Pending' or 'Approved' on 'Admin Profile' page
And Admin user logs out from application

Examples: 

# Profile Invalid First Name
1 N010 JJJXXQQ

    "status": "success",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 4458,
            "platformId": 1,

    "status": "success",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 4467,
            "platformId": 1,
            "platformConfigName": "Moderation Primary Photo Auto Approve",
